name: Jeff Roe, Cruz for President
subject: A great week in South Carolina!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CRUZ FOR PRESIDENT www
body:
Hello Friend,

Some more great news to share with you. Ted completed last week at the South Carolina Republican Party's State Convention, where CNN reported he received one of the more "enthusiastic responses from the crowd," and he'll complete this week back in the Palmetto State were we've made great gains!

Ted also performed exceptionally well in straw polls conducted across South Carolina -- where he completed a sweep of five different county straw polls. Building on that momentum, our South Carolina State Director, LaDonna Ryggs sent a letter welcoming the members of our South Carolina Leadership Team <https://www.tedcruz.org/news/cruz-for-president-welcomes-south-carolina-leadership-team/>.

The team consists of State Senator Lee Bright, State Representative Bill Chumley, and Sheriff Ray Nash, who will serve as the South Carolina State Co-Chairmen, in addition to 40 other conservative activists and influencers.

We've come a long way since Ted launched this campaign on March 23rd -- millions of dollars raised, tens of thousands of courageous conservatives have signed up to volunteer <https://www.tedcruz.org/volunteer/>, and now our state leadership teams in early primary and caucus states are coming together. And none of this would be possible without your steadfast support.

All the best,

Jeff Roe
Campaign Manager
Cruz for President

P.S. If you're in Iowa, we hope you'll join Ted this Monday for events in Onawa and Sioux City. For more information and to RSVP to join us, please click here. <https://www.tedcruz.org/iowa/>
